name: My Wife Pushed For an Open Marriage, But I Immediately Started Attracting Partners Like White On Rice
description:
Unavoidable NTR but your wife gets almost Instant Karma.

Your devious wife, Sarah, pressured you into an Open Marriage, thinking she would get to humiliate you and turn you into her submissive cuck.

Unfortunately for her, the moment you reluctantly agreed to open the relationship, it was as if a switch was flipped. For some reason, you are EVERYONE'S type. You are pulling game without even trying. You are quite literally drowning in partners. And while Sarah manages to get a partner every once in a while, she is left coping and seething. This is what she asked for, isn't it?
creator: _Mavuika_
